title: Sapphire{RPG}Legacy
description: A modpack theme on fantasy and rpg that add classes, dragons, dungeons, and magic to your world
body:
![Feel the ambient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed3065fe2d7573b75d964059c4279c60c846f2c.png)
# **Embark on a Legendary Journey: Sapphire{RPG}Legacy Modpack**
Enter a world where magic, myths, and monster interwine to create a world pf endless adventure.This fantasy-themed modpack have around 200 mod will transform Minecraft into a mystical wonderland filled with towering castles, diverse biomes to explore, and dangerous dungeons to conquer.

Some of the main features:
- Classes and origins.
- Various biomes and dangerous dungeon to explore.
- Difficult bosses to defeat.
- Added Dimension for good experience
- Beter anmations and visuality.
- Defeat and tame mythical creatures with the Ice and Fire mod.

Some of mods that I added from other pages:
- [Vannilla Tweak Texture Pack 1.20x](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
- [Sea Dweller Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers)

I added some data packs :
- Homes: let you set your base location at tp there when you the lost with the "/trigger home set" command.
- Dragon drops: when you defeat enderdragon, it will drop an elytra and dragon egg.
- Anti Enderman Grief
- Anti Ghast Grief

_**Note**_: this modpack was created by a Vietnamese player, so please support me for update in the future.
